description: A therapeutic hair mask saturated with moisture, based on natural dead sea mud, carrot oil, Obliphicha oil, natural extracts, vitamin B5 + E.
description_full:
Hair mask - SPA - 350 ml
A therapeutic hair mask saturated with moisture, based on natural dead sea mud, carrot oil, Obliphicha oil, natural extracts, vitamin B5 + E and Dead Sea minerals for maximum nutrition of the hair and scalp.
The mud hair mask calls the hair strength, shine and vitality and protects its color. It is suitable for all hair types and especially for softening curls, damaged or colored hair and with a tendency for dandruff.
The mask provides the hair with a wafer-thin protective layer that protects it from radiation damage. Regular use makes the hair soft, flexible and radiant.
Instructions for use
After shampooing, remove excess water from the hair. Drain a generous amount into the hair at the root, wait about 2-3 minutes and rinse with warm water. 350ml

name: Soap and skin cream - SPA
description: Soap and skin cream - SPA
description_full:
Soap and skin cream - SPA
Psor soap, 100gr
Psoriasis is a genetic chronic skin disease. Psoriasis usually leads to the formation of excessively dry, red patches on the skin, usually on the elbows, knees and scalp. This condition of the skin requires a moisturizing and soothing agent. Psor soap is a unique hypoallergenic, natural handmade soap. The pH of this soap is optimal for irritated skin. It removes the dry layer of the skin, calms redness, relieves itching and effectively treats various skin problems.
This soap is enriched with minerals from the Dead Sea. Benzoe - known for the relaxation of irritated skin. It also contains olive oil, dead sea mud, soothing aloe vera extract, chamomile, bergamot, geranium and tea tree oil. It also contains lavender oil and calendula oil, which are anti-inflammatory and healing for the tissue of the skin.
Instructions for use
Increases absorption. Generously soap the body - then let it work for 2 minutes and then rinse thoroughly. Proven results are felt after regular use. To complete the treatment, apply Psoderm to the cleaned areas.
PSO Skin Relief Cream, 250ml
The relief cream is a unique, natural and fast absorbing cream. It is enriched with herbal extracts that aim to soothe the skin and eliminate numerous skin problems such as skin irritation, itching, rash, extreme dryness followed by cracks, dandruff and redness.
The cream is enriched with Dead Sea minerals, seaweed extract, soothing green tea extract and regenerating avocado oil. It contains olive oil for irritation relief and is beneficial against skin flaking. Also it is enriched with vitamins and antioxidants, shea butter for cell skin renewal, aloe vera extract for balanced moisture, ginseng, patchouli oil, chamomile, vitamin C + E. It also contains no steroids or tar derivatives. The special combination of rich ingredients moisturizes and soothes the skin significantly and improves the texture.
Instructions for use
Clean the affected areas and apply twice daily: morning and evening. The improvement can be felt after a few times of use and the skin is nourished and relaxed.

This powerful cream is enriched with black mud, Dead Sea minerals, herbal extracts, essential and healing oils such as aloe vera juice, olive oil, shea butter, argan oil, sea buckthorn oil, tea tree oil, marigold, lavender oil, coconut oil. Thea Women Perfumes - Perfume Notes
Top notes: black berry
Middle notes: freesia and May rose
Base notes: vanilla, patchouli and woody notes
Perfume Type, 30ml
Fragrant note: mossy woods
Fragrant intensity: fresh-intensive
The development of a signature scent is a long way trip, generally lasting between 6 and 18 months. Each fragrance starts with a dream, inspiration from a real history or moments, an “orchestra theme” which can either take the form of a material base – the mix of two or three raw materials, like an initial note at the whole music project – or of an initial feeling, the desire to translate or convey a specific emotion.
From there, the perfumers gradually build a full-scale composition, tinkering and problem-solving until a perfect balance is achieved.
The challenge is to polish and perfect without losing the impact and personality of the original idea.
Ingredients
Alcohol Denat, Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Limonene, Linalool, Hydroxycitronellal, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol, Eugenol

Nana Women Perfumes Premium Floral Oriental and Intensive. Discover “Nana”, radiant and mysterious, the elixir of absolute femininity. Be seduced by the soothing solar energy of this extraordinary fragrance from elsewhere. Luminous like a brilliant solar flower, the fragrance exudes a positive energy, charged with mystery. name: Musa Women Perfumes Premium 15 ml -  Fleur
description: “Musa” is a unique olfactory adventure at the crossroads between the sensuality of a salty vanilla accord and the freshness of floral notes.
description_full:
Musa Women Perfumes Premium 15 ml - by Fleur
Musa Women Perfumes Premium Woody Oriental & Fresh Intensive. “Musa” is a unique olfactory adventure at the crossroads between the sensuality of a salty vanilla accord and the freshness of floral notes. It is a fresh oriental in which green mandarin awakens the senses, boosted by the floral and aquatic essences of ginger lily and hydroponic jasmine.
It is tempting, bold, and absolute in nature. The sensual and luminous salty vanilla accord brings addictive magnetism, amplified by sandalwood and an ambergris accord. Give yourself the opportunity to become one of the nine ancient deities.
Musa Women Perfumes - Perfume Notes
Top notes : Green mandarin, jasmine, ginger blossom
Middle notes: vanilla, salt
Base notes: Amber, Cashmere, sandalwood

name: Pagaioils 100% Daphne Essential Oil, 5ml
description: Pagaioils Essential Oil of Pagaioils, 5ml
description_full:
Essential Oil of Pagaioils - 100% Daphne Essential Oil
• Antimicrobial, antiviral, antifungal, antimicrobial, antiseptic,
• Explosive, mucolytic,
• Painkiller effective, anti-neuralgic,
• Balances psychology and "gives confidence to the winner" (with inhalations)
• Antihypertensive.
Ways of use and recipes
Oral infections: incorporated in mouthwash in amnesia and toothache. For "trag" (In examinations, interviews), drop 2-3 drops on a piece of cotton and inhale. For oily skin. Very good essential oil for men's skincare (for example after-shave products). To boost hair growth, add 3 drops of Daphnia essential oil to your shampoo or alternatively you can dissolve 30 drops of laurel essential oil in 100ml of almond oil, lightly massage the scalp once a week, wait 1 -2 hours and then run normally.
Caution
The pure, undiluted laurel can cause burns and redness in the skin. Laurel oil when you drink it brings nausea, vomiting, colic and burn in the stomach. It should not be used during pregnancy as it may cause menstruation. More products of Pagaioils you will see:
here...

name: 100% Almond Oil of Pagaioils, 50ml
description: Pagaioils Almond Oil, 50ml
description_full:
100% Almond Oil of Pagaioils
Basic information of Almond oil: Almond oil comes from cold pressing of almonds, traditionally used in aromatherapy as a basic carrier for the dissolution of essential oils, as a basic vegetable oil for massage, as a product of skin and hair care, but also as a pharmaceutical oil. It is odorless, hypoallergenic with very nice light texture, while it spreads and absorbs very easily.
It is considered one of the best oils because it is not too heavy or sticky. It is also very moisturizing and for this of its property, it is used by many cosmetic and skin care companies.
Components: Almond oil contains vitamins A, E, B1, B2, B6, K, trace elements, such as calcium, chlorine, magnesium and phosphorus. It is rich in fatty acids and contains zinc and iron. It is rich in palmitate, oleic and linoleic acid, elements that are precious for our skin.
Therapeutic actions and uses
For dark circles under the eyes, apply almond oil in the evening and let it work during sleep. It offers health and shine to the hair. It is softening and beneficial, especially for the ends of the hair. Apply a few hours before shampooing at the ends of your hair. Almond oil is soothing and anti-inflammatory, it does very well in cases of irritations, such as after hair removal, is very useful in cases of dry scalp.
Small infections, irritations, burns, sores, even eczema can also be treated and treated with the use of almond oil. It is an excellent cleanser for every type of skin. Helps skin regeneration, tightening pores and reducing scars.
Effective against acne. Oil massage improves blood circulation and moisturizes dry and dull skin effectively, making it look smoother and shinier. For strong, dense and beautiful eyelashes, apply a little of almond oil every night on your eyelash line. For strong eyebrows, pass a little of almond oil. Moisturizes dry and chapped lips. For strong and white nails, pour over the almond oil.
It is an excellent oil for make-up remover (especially if you use it with rosewater in equal proportions). It is useful after exposure to the sun.
Precautions
Avoid using it if you have nut allergy. Store in a dry and cool place to prevent damage.

description_full:
Pagaioils 100% essential oil Artemisia-Avistia, 5ml
Artemisia is known as the best herb for worms. It is antispasmodic(recommended for problems of hysteria, convulsions, epilepsy, anxiety, nervous vomiting). There is evidence that it is antifungal and has antibacterial properties. Relieves rheumatic and arthritic pain.
It is a diuretic, a digestive agent. A slight antipyretic effect. It can be used to treat hemorrhoids and sinusitis.
Attention
Take this remedy in small portions, and do not use for more than two weeks. Over a longer period, it may be poisoning cause. It should not be given to pregnant or lactating women. In any case, a specialist should be consulted.

name: Crete honey - 1kg

description_full:
Crete honey - 1 kg
The Cretan thyme honey product*
, certified as P.D.O. by the European Union, is one of the highest quality honeys in the world. People have loved honey since the Stone Age.
The ancient Egyptians offered it to the gods and the ancient Greeks, Romans and Chinese used it as an ointment against wounds, to treat fever and stomach complaints.
Today, its curative properties are that can prevent cancer and reduce heart disease, ulcers, alleviate digestive problems, regulate blood sugar, cough and sore throat.
The blooming, aromatic flora of the Cretan mountains is transformed into honey, one of the most valuable and nutritious foods for mankind. It gives energy to the muscles, clarity of mind, disinfects the organs of the human body, provides vitality and prolongs life.
*Designation of origin means a name identifying a product
(a) which originates in a particular place, in a particular region or in exceptional cases, a country
(b) whose quality or characteristics are essentially or exclusively due to a particular geographical environment
and (c) the stages of production, all of which take place in the defined geographical area.

Myrovolos Lemon Melissa - 25gr
The lemon balm from Chios/Greece is one of the classic culinary and medicinal herbs that no garden or balcony should be without.
The mild, lemon-scented aroma makes lemon balm one of the most popular and versatile aromatic herbs. The ingredients contained in the lemon balm also help with nervous restlessness or stomach complaints.
Lemon balm: Melissa is actually a plant from the Mediterranean region. But because it has so many healing effects, it has long been cultivated in Central European gardens. In the Middle Ages it even had to be cultivated by decree in every monastery garden, because even then it was considered very valuable and indispensable.
It smells slightly lemon-like when rubbed, which is why it is often called lemon balm. Once it has become at home in a garden, it grows year after year and offers itself as house tea and a variety of medicines. The main application of balm is the calming of the nervous system, with which it can help against nervous heart complaints, sleep disorders, restlessness, irritability and many other nervous complaints.

name: Myrovolos Thyme - 25gr
description: Thyme & Cuisine: Thyme goes well with fish and poultry, lamb and veal. Last but not least, the cabbage also goes well with leaf salads or sheep's cheese baked in aluminum foil.
description_full:
Myrovolos Greek thyme from Chios, 25g
Thyme & Cuisine: Thyme goes well with fish and poultry, lamb and veal. Last but not least, the cabbage also goes well with leaf salads or sheep's cheese baked in aluminum foil.
Thyme is a versatile medicinal and aromatic herb. With its unmistakable taste it spices numerous Mediterranean dishes. But the thyme can do much more.
In natural medicine, the plant is regarded as an excellent medicinal herb, which can relieve colds, coughs and stomach complaints, among other things. The antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties of thyme earned it the title of a medicinal plant.
Thyme is not only an interesting spice plant, but also an important medicinal plant for coughing and disinfection. The persistent plant grows bravely year after year in the herb garden and smells spicy. The small leaves are quite easy to rebuff from the woody stem and can be used as a kitchen spice or tea.
You can hardly imagine Povencal recipes without thyme. As a medicinal plant, thyme is the purest jack-of-all-trades. There's hardly an area where the thyme can't help. Its greatest strength, however, lies in its healing effect on the respiratory organs.

name: Essential cedar wood oil - Thraco - 10ml
description: It is often used in meditation by providing spiritual clarity. It is also used to treat the body, acts as a tonic, stimulates blood circulation, fights cellulite and fluid retention.
description_full:
Thraco Essential Cedar Wood Oil, 10ml
Juniperus virginiana - The essential cedar wood oil has a pale, warm and woody aroma.
It is often used in meditation by providing spiritual clarity. It is also used to treat the body, acts as a tonic, stimulates blood circulation, fights cellulite and fluid retention. It contains cosmetic recipes and has a soothing effect on oily and acne skin, balances sebum secretion and effectively treats hair loss and dandruff.
The essential oil from cedar wood soothes the mucous cough through steam inhalation and fights infections of the respiratory tract.
On a psychological level, cedar wood strengthens self-confidence, strengthens mental performance, combats stress and phobias.
Properties
Antiseptic
antifungal
astringent
insect repellent
Usage For external use only. Please dissolve in a vegetable base oil (e.g. almond oil) for massage. In aromatherapy diffuses diluted in water.
To inhale, place 6-8 drops of essential oil in a pot of boiling water. Locally in the affected skin areas, dissolved in base oil, in a ratio of 1:3. Papers impregnated with the essential oil are placed in the drawers as moth repellents.

name: Bay laurel essential oil - Thraco - 10ml
description: Bay Laurel is one of the best known essential oils for treating the scalp. It activates the blood circulation of the scalp, combats dandruff, nourishes and stimulates the hair.
description_full:
Bay laurel essential oil - Thraco - 10ml
Laurus nobilis leaf oil - Bay Laurel is one of the best known essential oils for treating the scalp. It activates the blood circulation of the scalp, combats dandruff, nourishes and stimulates the hair.
The properties of Bay Laurel make the essential oil good for therapeutic massages to relieve physical pain. It also has a beneficial effect on the respiratory tract when used for steam inhalation. On a psychological level laurel oil strengthens self-confidence.
For external use only. It is not recommended for sensitive skin and for long-term use.
Laurus nobilis leaf oil has cool, spicy, high notes reminiscent of camphor, with sweet, warm balsamic underwool. It goes well with the essential oils of most spices and citrus fruits (Farrer-Halls, 2007).
Properties
analgesic
antiseptic
astringent
expectorant
How to use
For external use only. It is not recommended for sensitive skin and for long-term use.
Please pay attention! Application: dissolved in a natural base oil (e.g. almond oil) for massage. For aromatherapy diffuses. To inhale, put 4-5 drops of essential oil in a pot of boiling water.

name: Olive oil soap with activated carbon - Thraco - 100gr
description: A gentle, skin-friendly soap suitable for daily use. For deep cleansing and detoxification. The soap has essential ingredients with extra virgin olive oil.
description_full:
Olive oil soap with activated carbon - Thraco - 100g
A gentle, skin-friendly soap suitable for daily use. For deep cleansing and detoxification. The soap has essential ingredients with extra virgin olive oil.
Activated carbon has been added to the classic olive oil soap formula to effectively care for the skin exposed to daily stress.
Activated carbon has the ability to bind and remove pollutants from the outer layer of the skin and prepares it to take the care it deserves.
It balances the fat level of the skin and is considered effective in the treatment of eczema and psoriasis. Removes excess sebum from the pores and is an excellent weapon in the fight against acne. Activated carbon is also regarded as an inhibitor of premature aging and skin flaccidity.
Ideal for daily use on face and body. Suitable for all skin types.
Ingredients
Sodium olivate, sodium cocoate, carbon, sodium almondate, sodium wheat germ, fragrance.

name: Olive soap with Scandinavian pine resin - Thraco - 110gr

description_full:
Olive soap with Scandinavian pine resin - Thraco - 110g
Following the traditional Scandinavian soap recipe with pine resin, we offer a natural soap with the essential ingredient of extra virgin olive oil to which we have added high quality natural oils. Soap with an unmistakable pine aroma.
Scandinavian pine resin is known for its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. It is considered effective in the treatment of dermatological problems such as eczema, psoriasis and dandruff. Ideal for the care of skin areas affected by everyday stress.
Gentle soap for body and hair.
This soap is not recommended for very dry skin.
Ingredients
Sodium Olivate, Sodium Cocoate, Palustris (Pine) Wood Tar, Sodium Almondate, Sodium Weatgermate, Fragrance.

Ideal for all skin types.

name: Organic Spirulina Tablets - 144gr
description: Package with 120 pieces/36g or 480 pieces/144g. 100% natural product from Hellas. Collected and naturally dried with the help of the sun. Try it in salads, yoghurt and muesli.
description_full:
Organic Spirulina Tablets - 144gr - 480 pieces
Directly from the manufacturer in Greece.
The microalga Spirulina is one of the best natural sources of protein and was discovered by the Aztecs (the Aztecs were members of a Mesoamerican civilization that created a high culture and existed between the 14th and early 16th centuries) in the 16th century and consumed daily for its strengthening and nourishing effects. Directly sourced from Greece and harvested by hand to ensure the best quality in Europe.
Package with 120 pieces/36g or 480 pieces/144g. 100% natural product from Hellas. Collected and naturally dried with the help of the sun. Try it in salads, yoghurt and muesli.
Vitamins
A, B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, E, K. - Antioxidant compounds - B-carotene, zeaxanthin, phycocyanin - minerals and trace elements - calcium, iron, copper, chromium, manganese, selenium, magnesium, zinc - fatty acids (GLA) gamma-linolenic acid (ALA) α-linolenic acid, high - polysaccharides Ca-Sp calcium spiroylan - amino acids isoleucine, leucine, lysine, methionine, threonine, tryptophan, valine, phenylalanine. Rich in vitamin, B complex, vitamin A and vitamin E.
Please note
The best producers of spirulina in Europe are in Greece, Spain, France and Italy. Much of what is offered here in Germany usually comes from the Far East. Quality has its price.

Greek Organic Mountain Tea
In ancient times it was called "siderite" because it was considered a herb that can heal wounds from iron weapons. It comes from the Mediterranean and especially from the mountainous Greek areas. description: The sage is native to Greece and grows in mountainous and rocky areas. The scientific name for salvia comes from the Latin word salvare, which means save/heal.
description_full:
Greek Organic Sage
The sage is native to Greece and grows in mountainous and rocky areas. The scientific name for "salvia" comes from the Latin word "salvare", which means "save/heal". It is often used as a decoction for its antibacterial, antimicrobial, disinfectant, antispasmodic, anti-cancer and antioxidant activities. It treats excessive sweating, indigestion, Inflammation of the mouth and throat and nervous disorders. As a spice, it is used in many recipes in Greek cuisine, because it goes with very different types of meat and potato salads.

name: Zeila day cream Q10
description: Apply to a clean face every morning until it is absorbed. Repeat during the day if necessary.
description_full:
Antioxidant, refreshing, collagen & elastin bio-energizing Erofili day cream with Q10
EROFILI Q10 Day Cream is a special day cream that offers strong antioxidant protection, activates collagen and elastin production and moisturizes the skin. It gives the skin a strong, healthy, energetic and radiant appearance by activating its natural metabolism and at the same time protecting it from damage and toxins.
EROFILI Q10 DAY CREAM consists of up to 98.90% INGREDIENTS FROM NATURAL SOURCES AND VITAMINS and is friendly for both humans and the environment. Zelia day cream is made in Greece and has been dermatologically tested.
ZELIA DAY CREAM IS SUITABLE FOR WOMEN AND MEN AND ALL SKIN TYPES OR AGE 20+.
The antioxidant and regenerating day cream EROFILI with Q10 contains: Coenzyme Q10, a naturally occurring molecule that acts as a powerful antioxidant by neutralizing free radicals while increasing collagen and elastin production. A copper complex with amino acids that complements the effects of Q10 coenzyme and increases the production of collagen type I (up to + 179%) and III (up to + 194%) within 11 days. The copper complex with amino acids is also part of our skin, but decreases over time. It is a “needle-free” filler for the wrinkles. Almond oil, sesame oil, shea butter and vegetable oil esters that protect the hydrolipidic balance of the epidermis. Aloe and extracts from olive leaves, helichrysum and horsetail (equisetum). They are rich in trace elements, vitamins and antioxidants. They moisturize the skin and protect it from inflammation. Bisalbolol-a (a component of Chamomilla Recutita Flower Oil), essential oils of neroli and geranium that soothe irritated or sensitive skin and give a balance to oily or dry skin.
Application:
Apply to a clean face every morning until it is absorbed. Repeat during the day if necessary. TIP: Wear the EROFILI Q10 day cream under your
SUNSCREEN CREAM HELIATOR on. They effectively protect your skin from the harmful effects of light aging such as skin roughness, spots and fine wrinkles.
Ingredients:
Almond Oil, Sesame Oil, Shea Butter and vegetable oil esters that protect the hydrolipidic balance of the epidermis. Aloe and extracts of olive leaves, Helichrysum and Horsetail (Equisetum). They are rich in trace elements, vitamins and antioxidants. They moisturize skin and protect it from inflammation. Bisalbolol-a (a component of Chamomilla Recutita Flower Oil), Neroli and Geranium essential oils that soothe irritated or sensitive skin and give balance to oily or dry skin.
AQUA (WATER), GLYCERYLSTEARATZITRAT, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, glycerin, sorbitol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) BUTTER, caprylic / CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE dicaprylyl carbonate, cetearyl alcohol, undecane, tridecane, glyceryl citrate / LACTATE / linoleate / oleate, HYDROGENATED ETHYLHEXYL olivate, olea europaea (olive) leaf extract, ubiquinone COPPER lysinate / prolinate, methylglucoside PHOSPHATE, bisabolol, HELICHRYSUM stoechas EXTRACT, equisetum arvense (HORSETAIL) LEAF EXTRACT, hydrogenated OLIVE OIL unsaponifiable, hydrogenated vegetable oil, sunflower oil, heliant vegetable oil, heliant oil, heliant oil, heliant oil Sodium phytate, palmitin, stearin, xanthan gum, chlorphenesin, ethylhexylglycerol, ALCOHOL, phenoxyethanol, pelargonium graveolens (ROSENGERANIUM) FLOWER OIL, CITRUS AURANTIUM AMARA (NEROLY) FLOWER OIL, SODIUM BENZOLATE, POTOLINE, POTOLINE, POTOLINE , GERANIOL *, LIMES *.

name: Zelia anti aging day cream, 50ml
description: Zelia anti aging day cream. A very good day cream, the composition of which makes it a highly effective day cream. 50ml
description_full:
Zelia anti aging day cream. A very good day cream, the composition of which makes it a highly effective day cream. 50ml
APHRODITE Anti Aging and Firming Face Cream is a premium day cream with a gentle, effective formula. Increases the natural production of collagen and elastin, it helps drastically in regulating cell activity. It restructures tired skin tissue, protects against free radicals, increases skin thickness and reduces the appearance of pores, fine lines and wrinkles. It combines the effects of natural ingredients with plant stem cells and peptides. It is considered a clean beauty product that is made entirely from resource-conserving and environmentally friendly raw materials. It is dermatologically tested and manufactured in Greece.
The anti-wrinkle factor day cream APHRODITE consists of 98.45% natural sources, plant stem cells, essential oils, peptides and vitamins.
SUITABLE FOR MEN AND WOMEN 35+. WITH EXCELLENT RESULTS FOR THE 45+ AGE GROUP.
The APHRODITE anti-wrinkle day cream contains:
Active copper complex with amino acids (needle-free collagen and elastin filler). According to studies, it stimulates the synthesis of collagen (+ 194%) and elastin (+190) within 15 days, reduces the depth of wrinkles (-15%) and volume (-13%) and increases skin density (+ 7.5% ) and elasticity (+ 60%) and tightens the skin (+13 times)! Plant stem cells from Edelweiss and the cultivation of green apple cells, which accelerate cell renewal, help protect the cells from oxidative stress, improve the longevity of skin stem cells, delay cell aging and maintain the youthful appearance and vitality of the skin. Four different types of firming peptides. They offer clinically proven anti-wrinkle and firming effects that lead to radiant, moisturized and rejuvenated skin. Their use has an effect similar to the use of botox.
Quinoa seed extract with anti-wrinkle effect; It also ensures immediate and long-term lifting, moisturizes and creates a protective film on the skin surface. Witch hazel extract. Rich in tannins, it helps protect against antioxidants and repair skin. Centella extract. Rich in triterpenoids, it improves microcirculation and inhibits enzymes that break down the skin's collagen. it stimulates the biosynthesis of new collagen. Squalane. Olive oil with anti-aging properties rejuvenates the cells, prevents dehydration and restores the elasticity and shine of the skin. Rosa canina (rose hip) fruit oil. As a natural source of vitamin C, it softens fine lines and discolorations. Excellent moisturizing and healing properties; It improves the skin structure. Allantoin. It improves cell metabolism and has softening, soothing and healing properties that support tissue regeneration and repair. Amino acids and polysaccharides are essential elements that activate collagen and elastin synthesis, tighten the skin and make it more resistant. Frankincense, palmarosa and chamomile essential oils with antioxidant, moisturizing, antiseptic and soothing properties; Frankincense in particular “repairs” DNA damage.
The APHRODITE anti-wrinkle and firming face cream contains no synthetic silicones, polyacrylates, parabens, mineral oils, ΒΗΤ, ΒΗΑ, phthalates. No animal testing.
Application:

Aloe: Its moisturizing, softening, anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial and antioxidant properties guarantee a generous protection against free radicals thanks to the flavones it contains. It has mild antihistamine properties and contains vitamins, minerals and amino acids.
Vitamin C. The youth vitamin that supports collagen production, combats free radicals, offers mild UVA protection and improves the elasticity and shine of the skin. Gingko biloba extract. A real gem! It protects the skin from redness and inflammation caused by UVA / UVB. A powerful antioxidant and anti-inflammatory that also improves microcirculation and activates cell metabolism. It delays skin aging by reducing collagen breakdown and hyaluronic acid. Green tea extract: Anti-inflammatory and rich in antioxidants. It protects your skin from the devastating effects of free radicals by preventing the collagen breakdown caused by UV radiation. The xanthines contained stimulate the microcirculation of the skin and improve the complexion and glow.
Lavender essential oil: Anti-inflammatory; protects against sunburn. Α-bisabolol. One of the ingredients in chamomile. It has anti-inflammatory, moisturizing and healing properties; It protects the skin collagen. Vanilla extract. A source of B complex vitamins (niacin, iamhiamin, B6, pantothenic acid) that play an important role in skin health. Its antioxidant properties protect the skin from lesions caused by environmental pollutants and toxins.
Zelia Heliator sunscreen does not contain synthetic silicones and polyacrylates, sunscreens that disrupt the functions of the endocrine glands, parabens, mineral oils, ΒΗΤ, ΒΗΑ, phthalic acid derivatives. No animal testing.
Application: Apply at least 30 minutes before the skin is exposed to the sun. Refresh yourself, especially after sweating, drying or swimming. Direct sunlight can endanger your general health. Avoid exposing yourself to the sun during the hours of intense sunlight.
Ingredients: caffeine, E&C vitamins, ginkgo biloba extract, vanilla extract, matricaria chamomile extract, lavender, green tea, natural moisture factor, aloe, sesame oil, sunflower oil.
INGREDIENTS: AQUA (WATER), Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Methylene BISBENZOTRIAZOLYL TETRAMETHYL-Butylphenol (Nano-), Glycerin, BISETHYLHEXYLOXYPHENOL Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Sorbitol, Capryl / Caprin-Triglymethoxidyl, Oxide, Triglyl Methoxide Oxide, Isotyl Oxide, Trityl Methyl Oxide, Trityl Methyl Oxide olivate, cetearyl alcohol, PEG-20 stearate, aloe vera gel, sesameum indicum KERNÖL, Helianthus annuus KERNÖL, ascorbyl palmitate, isopropyl myristate, tocopheryl acetate, decyl glucoside, sodium PCA, cetyl alcohol, LAVANDULA BOLAINE BOLAINE BLASTELA BOLAINE BELLAOL BLABOLAINE BLASTELAINE BLASTELAINE BLASTELAINE BLOOD BELLOLAINE BLOOD BELL BLUE PLANIFOLIA FRUIT EXTRACT, COFFEE, ISOAMYLKOCOAT, SODIUM SULFIT, POTASSIUMSORBAT, SODIUM BENZOAT, POLYSORBY, CY, BYZOAT, POLYSORBAT, CY, BYZYAT * LINALOOL, * CITRONELLOL, * LIMARINE, * LIMARINE.

name: Kalliston Soap for Dogs
description: Pure Olive Oil Soap for Dogs, 130g
description_full:
Kalliston Pure Olive Oil Soap for Dogs, 130g
EFFECTIVE INGREDIENTS ALOE VERA EXTRACT - SEA SALT - ESSENTIAL OIL CEDAR WOOD. Suitable for the dog's pH. Gently cleans the dog's skin and fur. The fur becomes shiny and soft. Made on a precious olive oil base, it also contains moisturizing aloe vera and sea salt. It is also enriched with cedarwood essential oil.
Ingredients: SODIUM OLIVAT, AQUA (WATER), SODIUM COCOAT, SODIUM CHLORIDE, MARIS AQUA (SEA WATER), BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER, GLYCERIN, JUNIPERUS VIRGINIANA citric acid, POTASSIUM SUMBIUM ORBATE.

name: Hand-and-body cream with olive oil and avocado oil, 150ml
description: Fine hand and body cream, high in antioxidants, prevents premature skin aging thanks to the organic olive oil.
description_full:
Hand-and-body cream with olive oil and avocado oil, 150ml
Fine hand and body cream, high in antioxidants, prevents premature skin aging thanks to the organic olive oil.
Avocado oil is high in vitamins and prevents skin irritation. Shea butter nourishes and moisturizes dry, cracked skin and gives it a silky texture. Gentle cream for hands and body.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply daily on body and hands. Massage gently. This cream moisturizes and is easily absorbed.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, PEG, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA, Palm oil and synthetic colors.

name: Kalliston - Shaving cream with bio olive-oil - 75 ml
description: Enriched with aloe vera juice, shea butter and organic olive oil, making the hair supple and protecting the skin. Suitable for use with or without a brush.
description_full:
Kalliston - Shaving cream with bio olive-oil - 75 ml
Shaving cream with a velvety texture that creates a high foam for optimal shaving results. Enriched with aloe vera juice, shea butter and organic olive oil, making the hair supple and protecting the skin. Suitable for use with or without a brush.
Dermatological tested.
Apply the cream to the wet face and lather with or without a brush. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water after shaving.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, BEG, Mineral oil, SILICONE, EDTA, BHT, DEA and synthetic colors.

name: Kalliston - Premium rich cream - 100ml
description: The nourishing ingredients such as shea butter, avocado, argan oil, olive oils, valuable vitamins E & B5 and hyaluronic acid moisturize and strengthen the skin's elasticity.
description_full:
Kalliston - Premium rich cream - 100ml
Cream for face, body and hands with organic olive oil, HYALURONIC ACID, avocado oil and vitamins.
The nourishing ingredients such as shea butter, avocado, argan oil, olive oils, valuable vitamins E & B5 and hyaluronic acid moisturize and strengthen the skin's elasticity.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply to face, body and hand and massage in gently until the cream is completely absorbed.
Without these ingredients
PEG, Mineral oil, Silicone, BHT, DEA and synthetic colors.
Ingredients
Avocado oil, hyaluronic acid, organic olive oil.

name: Kalliston - Multi-action protective - After shave balsam - 100 ml
description: Light after shave balm with active ingredients from carob and hyaluronic acid for additional moisture and elasticity.
description_full:
Kalliston - Multi-action protective - After shave balsam - 100 ml
Light after shave balm with active ingredients from carob and hyaluronic acid for additional moisture and elasticity.
The nourishing extra virgin olive oil, argan oil and vitamin F protect the skin after shaving.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply a small amount of balm to the palms of your hands and apply to your face after each shave.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, BEG, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA and synthetic colors.
Ingredients
Argan oil, carob extract, hyaluronic acid, organic olive oil, PANTHENOL.

name: Kalliston - Shampoo with olive leaf extract and Aloe Vera - 100 ml
description: Mild shampoo with an effective peptide from the pea, to supply the hair with moisture and to regenerate dry/damaged hair.
description_full:
Kalliston - Shampoo with olive leaf extract and Aloe Vera - 100 ml
Mild shampoo with an effective peptide from the pea, to supply the hair with moisture and to regenerate dry/damaged hair.
With mild cleansing agents that remove impurities without irritating or drying out the skin.
With Aloe Vera-Sa. and provitamin B5(panthenol) for care of the hair with moisture and olive leaf extract to protect against oxidation stress.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEΑ and synthetic colors.

name: Kalliston - Pomade with bio olive oil - 75ml
description: Unique pomade for "non-sticky" styling on hair and beard. Coconut oil, related beeswax, extra virgin olive oil and laurel oil management and rights to shine the hair.
description_full:
Kalliston - Pomade with bio olive oil - 75ml
Unique pomade for "non-sticky" styling on hair and beard. Coconut oil, related beeswax, extra virgin olive oil and laurel oil management and rights to shine the hair.
Dermatological tested.
Apply a lot between your palms and rub them together until they become smooth. Apply to hair and beards. With organic olive oil, coconut oil, beeswax and laurel oil.
Ingredients
ORGANIC OLIVE OIL & BEE WAX: Olive oil is rich in oleic acid and phenolic compounds, the skin with conscious and an antioxidant protective offer.
BEE WAX: It hydrates the rough, dehydrated areas of the skin.
Without these ingredients
PEG, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA, synthetic dyes, Vaseline & PETROLATUM DERIVATIVES.

name: Kalliston Hair shampoo for daily care, 250ml
description: Use shampoo with aloe vera juice and panthenol every day. It contains only mild detergents that remove the dirt without irritating the scalp.
description_full:
Kalliston Hair shampoo for daily care, 250ml
Use shampoo with aloe vera juice and panthenol every day. It contains only mild detergents that remove the dirt without irritating the scalp.
Aloe vera juice, together with provitamin B5(panthenol) and organic olive oil, soothe and nourish the scalp and maintain the natural moisture of the skin and hair.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply to wet hair and massage gently until it foams. Rinse well with lukewarm water and repeat as often as necessary.
Without these ingredients
Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA, SLS-SLES and synthetic colors.
Ingredients
Aloe Vera extract, organic olive oil, PANTHENOL.

High texture that pampers without being heavy on the skin.
Thanks to its antioxidant and calming effect of mastiha and valuable olive oil, almond oil and shea butter, this cream moisturizes and creates a thin protective film on the skin that keeps it beautiful and soft.
Dermatological tested.
How to use
Apply daily on body and hands. Massage gently. This cream moisturizes and is easily absorbed.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, PEG, Mineral oils, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA, PALM OIL and synthetic colors.

Gentle cream for hands and body. With organic olive oil, high in antioxidants and oil from pomegranate seeds. In combination with the extract, it is a valuable antioxidant.
Shea butter nourishes and moisturizes dry, cracked skin and gives it a silky texture.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply daily to body and hands and massage in gently. This pomegranate cream moisturizes and nourishes, it is easily absorbed.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, Swirls, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA, PALM OIL and synthetic colors.

name: Kalliston - rich cream all over - 100ml
description: Face and body cream, high in nourishing butter, hyaluronic acid and vitamins. It contains oil blends from organic olive oil, avocado oil, shea butter and in combination with hyaluronic acid increases moisture and elasticity.
description_full:
Kalliston - Rich Cream All Over - 100ml
Face and body cream, high in nourishing butter, hyaluronic acid and vitamins. It contains oil blends from organic olive oil, avocado oil, shea butter and in combination with hyaluronic acid increases moisture and elasticity.
Nourish vitamin E and provitamin B5(panthenol) and provide additional skin care and protection.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply to face, body and hands and massage gently until the cream is completely absorbed. You can use this cream as often as you like.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, PEG, mineral oil, silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA and synthetic dyes.

name: Kalliston - Organic olive oil soap - Aloe Vera - 200 g
description: Gentle soap with organic olive oil and aloe vera juice, high in vitamins and minerals that nourish and soothe the skin, with vitamin E and provitamin B5 (panthenol).
description_full:
Kalliston organic olive oil soap aloe, 200g
Gentle soap with organic olive oil and aloe vera juice, high in vitamins and minerals that nourish and soothe the skin, with vitamin E and provitamin B5 (panthenol) to maintain the smoothness of the skin and its moisture content.
Dermatological tested.
Without these ingredients
Parabens, PEG, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA and synthetic colors.
Ingredients
Aloe Vera extract, organic olive oil, PANTHENOL, vitamin E.

name: Kalliston - active shower gel - 250ml
description: Its gentle cleaning components remove dirt efficiently and irritation-free, while tea tree oil and trehalose prevent the production of unpleasant smells and provide a feeling of freshness.
description_full:
Kalliston - Active shower gel, 250ml
Its gentle cleaning components remove dirt efficiently and irritation-free, while tea tree oil and trehalose prevent the production of unpleasant smells and provide a feeling of freshness. It also contains organic olive oil, which moisturizes the skin and makes it appear soft.
Dermatological tested
Application
Apply to damp skin and massage in gently. Rinse well with lukewarm water.
Without these ingredients
Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA, synthetic colors and SLS-SLES.
Ingredients
Organic olive oil, tea tree oil, trehalose.

name: Kalliston Natural Lifting & Anti Aging Face Cream, 70ml
description: With organic olive oil, mastiha, extract, hyaluronic acid.
description_full:
Kalliston Natural Lifting & Anti Aging Face Cream, 70ml
With organic olive oil, mastiha, extract, hyaluronic acid. Light men's cream for the face and eye area that is easily absorbed without leaving a feeling of greasiness. The mastiha extract provides the skin with antioxidants and fights free radicals that lead to premature skin aging. The hyaluronic acid contained - a strong ally of the youthful appearance - in combination with argan and olive oil, shea butter and natural polysaccharides provides moisture and elasticity to the skin.
Also, ideal as an aftershave.
Dermatological tested.
Application
Apply to face and eye area and massage in gently.
Ingredients
Argan oil, hyaluronic acid, mastiha extract (Lentisk from Greece), organic olive oil, pullulan and shea butter.
Without these ingredients
PEG, Mineral oil, Silicone, EDTA, BHT, DEA and synthetic colors.

name: Oros mahera Raw Blossom Honey, 1kg
description: The raw honey, which is obtained from the honeycomb without treatment.
description_full:
Cypriot Oros mahera Raw Blossom Honey, 1kg
The raw honey, which is obtained from the honeycomb without treatment, is considered uncooked and is made available to the consumer exactly as the bees produce it.
In contrast to honey, which is subjected to heat treatment and filtration, uncooked honey retains all the yeasts and pollen grains that give it its high nutritional value. Research has shown that yeasts cannot tolerate high temperatures. Thus the product can be kept in a liquid phase for a longer period of time, but loses nutritional value.

An old beeswax cream with many uses and properties. It relieves irritation, eczema, skin cracks, insect bites, burns and cracked lips. It has antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, antifungal, healing, calming, moisturizing and softening properties. It is particularly effective on dry skin.

name: Crealoe Anti Aging Day Cream, 50ml
description: The Cretan Goods anti-aging day cream with 100% natural aloe yeast extract and Thermus Thermophilus enzyme.
description_full:
Crealoe Anti Aging Day Cream, 50ml
The Cretan Goods anti-aging day cream with 100% natural aloe yeast extract and Thermus Thermophilus enzyme. The cream has regenerative and soothing properties and nourishes the skin with its valuable ingredients, since it helps to maintain the freshness and elasticity of the epidermis. It is lagging behind the signs of aging. It has an intensive moisturizing effect. It acts as a protective layer on the skin and stores the natural moisture. With its composition, it stimulates the 6 main building blocks of the skin matrix: collagen I, collagen III, fibronectin, hyaluronic acid, laminin, collagen IV and ensures a better tissue structure. It fills the wrinkles on the inside of both the forehead and the leg and ensures noticeably smoother and firmer skin.
It contains an activity that mimics the protective enzymes naturally occurring on the skin against free radicals (antioxidants) such as SOD, catalase and glutathione peroxidase. During the test it was also observed that important signs of aging such as defects (skin graft anomaly and superficial capillaries), wrinkles, freckles and spots caused by UV radiation were reversed. It also helps prevent skin aging so that you look younger for longer. Tests showed that the skin can be five years younger in just 6 months of use. For all skin types, especially for “tired” skin.

name: Crealoe Night Nourishing Night Cream, 50ml
description: The specially developed Cretan Goods Night Nourishing Night Cream with 100% natural aloe juice.
description_full:
Crealoe Night Nourishing Night Cream, 50ml
The specially developed Cretan Goods Night Nourishing Night Cream with 100% natural aloe juice, yeast extract and tripeptide KMK penetrates the skin during sleep. It has anaplastic properties and nourishes the skin with its valuable ingredients, since it helps to maintain the freshness and elasticity of the epidermis. It is lagging behind the signs of aging. It has an intensive moisturizing effect. It acts as a protective layer on the skin and stores the natural moisture. With its composition, it stimulates the 6 main structural components of the skin matrix: collagen I, collagen III, fibronectin, hyaluronic acid, laminin, collagen IV and ensures a better tissue structure. It fills the wrinkles on the inside of both the forehead and the leg of the goose and ensures noticeably smoother and firmer skin.

name: Crealoe Moisturizing Hand Cream, 50ml
description: Cretan Goods Moisturizing hand cream with 100% natural aloe juice restores the lost moisture of the hands and keeps the skin soft and hydrated.
description_full:
Crealoe Moisturizing Hand Cream, 50ml
Cretan Goods Moisturizing hand cream with 100% natural aloe juice restores the lost moisture of the hands and keeps the skin soft and hydrated. It has regenerative and calming properties and nourishes the skin with its valuable ingredients, since it helps to maintain the freshness and elasticity of the epidermis. It has a strong moisturizing effect on the epidermis for 24 hours. It acts as a protective layer on the skin and stores the natural moisture. Its fine and non-greasy composition is absorbed by the skin tissue and makes the skin soft, smooth and wonderfully hydrated.

name: Crealoe facial anti-aging serum, 30ml
description: Cretan Goods facial anti-aging serum with 100% natural aloe and tripeptide KMK can be used on all skin types and ages.
description_full:
Crealoe facial anti-aging serum, 30ml
Cretan Goods facial anti-aging serum with 100% natural aloe and tripeptide KMK can be used on all skin types and ages. The face serum is a low-molecular gel formulation with dry vegetable oils, which have the property of penetrating into the deep layers of the skin and rebuilding them from the inside out. It has an intensive moisturizing effect. With its synthesis, it stimulates the 6 main structural components of the skin matrix: collagen I, collagen III, fibronectin, hyaluronic acid, laminin, collagen IV and ensures a better tissue structure. It fills the wrinkles on the inside of both the forehead and the leg of the goose and ensures noticeably smoother and firmer skin. It is suitable for dry and mature skin and brings the collagen back to a normal level, giving the skin its lost shine. It complements daily skin care with additional details that meet the needs of the skin. It is always applied before the face cream and enhances its effect.

name: Crealoe eye cream, 15ml
description: Cretan Goods eye cream with 100% natural aloe yeast extract and tripeptide KMK ensures visible lifting.
description_full:
Crealoe eye cream, 15ml
Cretan Goods eye cream with 100% natural aloe yeast extract and tripeptide KMK ensures visible lifting, contributes significantly to tightening the skin and reducing wrinkles around the eyes. With its composition, it stimulates the 6 main structural components of the skin matrix: collagen I, collagen III, fibronectin, hyaluronic acid, laminin, collagen IV and ensures a better tissue structure. Fills the wrinkles from the inside (goose foot) to noticeably improve the skin structure and reduce the wrinkles.

name: Crealoe body lotion, 30ml
description: Cretan Goods CreAloe body lotion contains fresh organic Cretan aloe juice, essential oils with citral-lavender basil and geranium and contains no alcohol.
description_full:
Crealoe body lotion, 30ml
Cretan Goods CreAloe body lotion contains fresh organic Cretan aloe juice, essential oils with citral-lavender basil and geranium and contains no alcohol, PEG or other chemical ingredients that are said to have negative effects on health or the environment. WITHOUT: PARABENS, SILICONES, MINERAL OIL, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, ETHANOLAMINE, DEET. It protects against insect bites thanks to the essential oils of citronella, lavender, lemongrass, basil and geranium. It moisturizes and softens the skin with allantoin, cucumber extract, eucalyptus blossom, lavender blossom panthenol (provitamin B-5) and fresh Cretan organic aloe juice.

name: Crealoe After Sun Moisturizing Cream Body - Face, 50ml
description: The After Sun Hydrating Body face cream from Cretan Goods with 100% natural aloe vera.
description_full:
Crealoe After Sun Moisturizing Cream Body - Face, 50ml
The After Sun Hydrating Body face cream from Cretan Goods with 100% natural aloe vera, sodium citrate and panthenol based on amino acids (premethamine B5) soothes the skin immediately and has an anti-inflammatory effect. The “coolness” it offers is due to the presence of salicylic acid, which has an anti-inflammatory effect. Enriched with a special zinc-rich liquid complex, it protects the DNA, the source code of all our cells, sun damage and UV radiation. It also inhibits the glycosylation reaction, prevents hardening of the skin and maintains its flexibility.
It is very well absorbed into the skin and has a calming and healing effect. It contributes significantly to the proliferation of cells, but also to the synthesis of intracellular proteins. This product offers long-term skin protection against loss of elasticity and strength. It contains substances that support the osmosis effect in the cells and ensure their good cooperation. It also contains substances that maintain the effect of hydration on the epidermis layer over a period of 24 hours. Its viscous, smooth and non-greasy formula is absorbed by the skin tissue and makes the skin soft, smooth and wonderfully hydrated.

name: Body Wash OLIVE, ALOE VERA, APRICOT, 70ml
description: oft bath & shower gel cleanses gently while treats the skin.
description_full:
Body Wash OLIVE, ALOE VERA, APRICOT, 70ml
Refreshment - Care - Softness
with Extra Virgin Olive Oil from CRETE - GREECE plus Olive Leaves Extract
Soft bath & shower gel cleanses gently while treats the skin. Enriched with water-softening agent as also with moisturizing and nourishing agents - Olive*, Vitamin E, Aloe Vera, Apricot - preserves the essential moisture of the epidermis and nourishes even the dehydrated skin, leaving it soft and flexible. Due to the friendly pH to the skin and its anti-irritant and soothing components - Aloe Vera, Witch Hazel, Panthenol, Vitamin E - protects the epidermis and is ideal for sensitive as also children’s skin. The fresh, allergen-free fragrance refreshes and gives a sense of wellbeing.

name: Body Lotion OLIVE,WITCH HAZEL, CHAMOMILE, 70ml
description: with Extra Virgin Olive Oil from CRETE - GREECE plus Olive Leaves Extract

Body Lotion OLIVE,WITCH HAZEL, CHAMOMILE, 70ml
Moisture - Treatment  Softness
with Extra Virgin Olive Oil from CRETE - GREECE plus Olive Leaves Extract
Hydrating and nourishing body lotion treats, protects and revitalizes the skin, without greasiness. Thanks to Olive*, Hamamelis and Calcium Pantothenate nourishes and offers essential moisture to the skin while in combination with Vitamin E gives antioxidant power and acts against skin ageing. The synergistic action of the above with the Chamomile and Vitamin F soothes the skin and at the same time prevents and relieves dryness and irritations. The non-oily texture is instantly absorbed leaving the skin smooth and flexible.

name: Nourish conditioner OLIVE, ROSEMARY, WHEAT strength
description: Nourish conditioner OLIVE, ROSEMARY, WHEAT strength - shine - volume ALL HAIR TYPES, 70ml
description_full:
Nourish conditioner OLIVE, ROSEMARY, WHEAT strength- shine - volume ALL HAIR TYPES, 70ml
with extra virgin olive oil from CRETE - GREECE plus olive leaf extract
The nourishing formula conditioner treats the hair and leaves it handy, loose and healthy without weighing it down. Panthenol (Pro-V) nourishes the hair with moisture, strengthens and strengthens the hair, reduces split ends and, in combination with olive * and almond, gives shine and shine and at the same time protects the scalp from dryness. Ceramides give volume and, in combination with keratin, strengthen the strength of the hair and make it flexible and shiny. Wheat smoothes and repairs and forms a protective film against external influences, while rosemary moisturizes and revitalizes.

name: Nourish shampoo OLIVE, ROSEMARY, WHEAT strength, 70ml
description: Nourish shampoo OLIVE, ROSEMARY, WHEAT strength - shine - volume - ALL HAIR TYPES, 70ml
description_full:
Nourish shampoo OLIVE, ROSEMARY, WHEAT strength - shine - volume - ALL HAIR TYPES, 70ml
with extra virgin olive oil from CRETE - GREECE plus olive leaf extract
Mild synthetic shampoo with softening and moisturizing components, gentle cleaning agents and water softeners cleans effectively and treats hair and skin. Olive * and panthenol (Pro-V) provide deep and smooth care, while rosemary, wheat and rice provide the hair with moisture and protect the scalp from dryness and irritation. Wheat forms a protective film against external influences and its combination with ceramides and keratin repairs and strengthens rich hair with volume, shine and silky feeling.

SUN BURNS AND IRRITATION

Face & Body

Reduces the ageing signs and protects against free radicals. Easily spread and quickly absorbed, leaves skin soft. Ideal for kids.

name: Panacea Sunscreen Dace SPF30
description: Sun-moisturizing face cream with aloe, pomegranate, cucumber and protection index 30.
description_full:
Panacea Sunscreen Dace SPF30, 50ml
Sun-moisturizing face cream with aloe, pomegranate, cucumber and protection index 30.
ALOE: moisturizing, anti-inflammatory, healing
POMEGRANATE: moisturizing, wrinkle-free, regenerating with a strong antioxidant effect. Contributes to the elasticity and firmness of the skin.
Cucumber: Rich in vitamin E and phytosterols. Contributes to the regeneration of skin cells. It's extremely moisturizing and anti-inflammatory.

name: Panaceaproducts EmmorOidi, 40ml
description: Hemorrhoids ointment relieves itching, pain and burning sensation.
description_full:
Panaceaproducts EmmorOidi, 40ml
Hemorrhoids ointment relieves itching, pain and burning sensation.
Horse Chestnut: Contains esculin and escin, ingredients that strengthen the walls of blood vessels. Cypress: High in flavonoids and polyphenols, leads to a noticeable improvement in blood circulation.
Plantago: Rich in allantoin, heals wounds and is anti-inflammatory. Accelerates the formation of new skin.
Ranunculus Ficaria (grassland): It has astringent properties. Aloe: healing, calming, anti-inflammatory.
Achilles: stimulates blood circulation. It is astringent, hemostatic for external bleeding and for healing wounds.
Hypericum: anti-inflammatory, astringent, healing, soothing. Sentela and Rouskos: They contribute to good blood circulation.
Mallow: astringent, healing, anti-inflammatory. Chamomile: anti-inflammatory, soothing.
KARITE Butter: Provides deep and continuous hydration, rich in Vitamins A, E and F.

name: Panacea AcneDerm, 30ml
description: Gel for acne prone skin.
description_full:
Panacea AcneDerm, 30ml
Gel for acne prone skin.
TEIODENTRO (ESSENTIAL OIL): Antiseptic, anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial. Eliminates excessive sebum secretion »CHAMPAGNE: Astringent and anti-inflammatory, it fights acne and reduces the size of the skin pores. »SALVIA OFFICINALIS (SAGE): Antiseptic» VITIS VINIFERA: Antimicrobial, anti-infectious, anti-inflammatory »THYMUS VULGARIS and THYMUS CAPITATUS HERBAL OIL: Treats acne-related bacteria» ROSEMARY: Contains ketones that stimulate the skin's metabolism.
"ALOE VERA:
Antibacterial (contains polysaccharides with antibacterial activity) Astringent (dries pimples to reduce pore size) Moisturizing, antibiotic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory
PLANTAGO LANCEOLATA: Antibacterial, healing
Malva sylvestris (mallow): Anti-inflammatory and soothing is ideal for treating swelling and acne.
PROPOLIS EXTRACT: A powerful antibacterial agent that effectively treats acne-related bacteria.

name: Panacea Acnederm Wash, 200ml
description: LIQUID SOAP FOR DEEP CLEANSING (Ideal for oily and acne-prone skin)
description_full:
Panacea Acnederm Wash, 200ml
LIQUID SOAP FOR DEEP CLEANSING (Ideal for oily and acne-prone skin)
TEIODENTRO (ESSENTIAL OIL): Antiseptic, anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial. Eliminates excessive sebum secretion
CHAMPAGNE: Astringent and anti-inflammatory, combats acne and reduces the size of the skin pores.
ALOE VERA: antibacterial (contains polysaccharides with antibacterial effects), astringent (dries pimples that help reduce pore size)
MALVA SYLVESTRIS (Mallow): Anti-inflammatory and soothing is ideal for treating swelling and acne.
PROPOLIS: helps treat the bacteria that cause acne.
LEVANTA: Strongly antiseptic and dynamically healing.

name: Panacea Slimicel, 150ml
description: Fights cellulite, moisturizes and visibly firms the skin.
description_full:
Panacea Slimicel, 150ml
Fights cellulite, moisturizes and visibly firms the skin.
Aesculus Hippocastanum Extract: Stimulates the venous and lymphatic circulation and thus reduces swelling
Ananas Sativus: Contains bromelain, an enzyme with anti-inflammatory properties that stimulates metabolic processes and fights the fat that accumulates in the pockets of the upper layers of the skin
Ivy extract: has anti-edematous properties and at the same time dissolves fat-fighting cellulite
Coffea Arabica: stimulates microcirculation. Contributes to fat dissolution by visibly fighting local fat
Centella asiatica extract: Strengthens the vein walls and improves blood circulation
Ruscus Aculeatus Extract: Stimulates blood circulation when applied topically to the cellulite problem area
Vaccinium Myrtillus Extract: It is rich in anthocyanins and vitamin C, ingredients that contribute to the formation of strong collagen tissue and consequently healthy skin
Cinnamomum Cassia: It is rich in flavonoids and volatile oils while being a source of magnesium. The active ingredient in MHCP works against free radicals.
ALGAE EXTRACT CARRAGEENAN: is a rich source of iodine and minerals that locally increase blood circulation
Panthenol: moisturizes and increases the elasticity of the skin
Organic aloe: soothes and firms the skin
Organic olive oil (extract): Moisturizes and increases skin elasticity
MINERAL OIL, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, PARABEN, FREE SILICONE

Moisturizing anti-wrinkle cream with hyaluronic acid and collagen.
Hyaluronic acid: Retains water while maintaining the natural structure, elasticity and firmness of the skin. Regulates collagen production Has powerful anti-wrinkle and antioxidant properties. Healing, regenerating skin.

name: Vevi Original Greek Thyme, 70g
description: This herb is packed with numerous health-promoting phytonutrients, minerals and vitamins that are essential for general well-being.
description_full:
Vevi Original Greek Thyme, 70g
Thyme is native to Greece, southern Europe and the Mediterranean region.
This herb is packed with numerous health-promoting phytonutrients, minerals and vitamins that are essential for general well-being. Botanically it belongs to the Lamiaceae family, in the genus Thymus.
There are a lot of subspecies, of which the most popular variety is Thymus vulgaris. The thyme plant is a perennial shrub with a thin woody base and square stems. It grows about 15 to 30 cm long, has small, light green leaves, including lighter, slightly curved, aromatic leaves. In summer, small, fragrant, lilac-colored or white flowers appear.
Some health benefits of thyme:
Thyme contains many active ingredients known to have disease prevention and health-promoting properties.
a rich source of  important vitamins like the vitamins of the B-complex, β-Carotin, vitamin A, vitamin K, vitamin E, vitamin C and folic acid.
Thyme provides 0.35 mg vitamin B-6 or pyridoxine which is about 27% of the recommended daily dose and maintains the GABA level (a favorable neurotransmitter in the brain) which helps breaking down stress

name: Vevi Original Ceylon Black Tea, 120g
description: Black tea contains complex flavonoids and polyphenols, which prevents several disease.
description_full:
Vevi Original Ceylon Black Tea, 120g
There are many antioxidants and polyphenols in black tea, which are associated with a number of health benefits. For instance black tea contains complex flavonoids,
polyphenols, which prevents several disease. A single cup of black tea contains ca. 200 mg of flavonoids -many doctors today recommend taking 600 mg of
flavonoids per day to achieve a number of health benefits. The flavonoid polyphenols in black tea, known as thearubigin and theaflavin, act as particularly powerful
antioxidants. Interestingly, these two flavonoids are more concentrated in black tea than in green tea.
Nutritional value of black tea
Black tea contains :
caffeine
Amino acids
Carbohydrates
Proteins
Potassium
Main and trace elements
Manganese
fluoride
Polyphenols

name: Vevi Original Greek Oregano, 70g
description: Oregano is a great perennial culinary and medicinal herb.
description_full:
Vevi Original Greek Oregano, 70g
Oregano is a great perennial culinary and medicinal herb. It has long been recognized as one of the "functional foods" because of its nutritious, antioxidant and
disease prevention properties. Oregano means "joy of the mountains" in Greek, is native to the Mediterranean region.
Botanically it belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae), in the genus Origanum and is scientifically known as Origanum vulgare. The small oregano shrub grows up to
75 cm high with small grey-green oval leaves and small white or pink flowers. The leaves have a distinct aromatic, warm and
slightly bitter taste which intensity varies. For example, a good quality oregano is so strong that it almost numbs the tongue.
However, the influences of climate, season and soil have a greater influence on the composition of the essential oils than biodiversity.
Origanum heracleoticum is another Greek variety that has an unmistakable pungent smell and taste.

name: Vevi Original Greek Mountain Tea, 25g
description: This tea, also called verbena, mountain and shepherd's tea, is a genus of flowering plants and most known as a herbal tea.
description_full:
Vevi Original Greek Mountain Tea, 25g
This tea, also called verbena, mountain and shepherd's tea, is a genus of flowering plants and most known as a herbal tea.
The plants occur in the mediterranean, balkan, the Iberian peninsulan and macaronesian area and is also used for herbal medicine.

name: Vevi Original Ceylon Green Tea, 120g
description: Due to its lower caffeine content green tea is a healthier alternative for normal drinks such as coffee or other teas.
description_full:
Vevi Original Ceylon Green Tea, 120g
Due to its lower caffeine content green tea is a healthier alternative for normal drinks such as coffee or other teas. It also contains a high amount of natural
antioxidants called polyphenols, which not only contribute to a healthy body, skin and hair, but also can reduce the growth of cancer cells.
Green tea is also a healthier option because of the way it is processed from the plant, Camellia sinensis. The green leaves for green tea are
steamed, which helps prevent oxidation of the catechins, while black  tea is made from fermented leaves, which leads to the loss of this very important
antioxidant. Recently, many people living in Western countries have switched from black tea to green tea.

name: Honey of coniferous trees and mountain flowers, 450g
description: The flora consists of about 2,500 plant specimens.
description_full:
Honey of coniferous trees and mountain flowers, 450g
Mount Paiko is located in Central Macedonia on the border of the prefectures of Pella and Kilkis and is the largest forest of Kastania in Greece with rich vegetation and several springs. The flora consists of about 2,500 plant specimens. The trees that cover Paiko are mainly chestnuts, beeches, pines, oaks, cedars, willows, poplars, birches, paliouri, holly, pseudo-acacias, multicomponent, wild rose, rosemary, sage, many other interesting plants and lilies, Ladania, ladania.
Properties
Taste:
Due to the low concentration of sugars, it is not too sweet.
Aroma:
Special and pleasant.
Viscosity:
Quite dense, dark, not clear.
Nutritional value:
Rich in antioxidant properties, large amounts of potassium, magnesium, phosphorus, iron, sodium, unique enzymes that enhance metabolism.
Crystallization:
Due to its content in wax, pollen, propolis does not crystallize but acquires a creamy texture, at a fairly slow rate.
Nutritions
A super nutritious food that can fill you with energy!
Its benefits are many and important and you can rightfully rank it in super foods, as it is rich in protein, amino acids, carbohydrates, fatty acids, vitamins (A-B1-B2-B3-B5-B6-B12-CDEHK-PP), mineral acids and enzymes. It helps with many diseases, such as intestinal problems, high cholesterol, hormonal disorders, hypertension, anorexia and obesity, poor pancreatic and liver function.
It contributes significantly to the stimulation of the immune system and the overall balance of the body, as a result of which it is reflected in your healthy skin.

name: Seamuse Krokos & Beetroot, 140g
description: Beetroot is known as one of the “super-foods” of our days, with various benefits on health, skin and hair.
description_full:
Seamuse
Krokos & Beetroot, 140g
Description
Your special skin nourishing soap. Infused with beetroot juice, Krokos (Greek Safran) seeds, jojoba oil and shea butter for supple, moisturized skin. Suitable for dry skin types.
Not only it leaves your skin with a unique and extraordinary aroma but also combines the magnificent medicinal properties of Krokos Kozanis – the Greek Red Saffron, and beetroot. Krokos Kozanis is widely known as one of the most beloved and precious spices of ancient cultures because of its aroma, color, pharmaceutical and aphrodisiac properties. It is cultivated in Kozani, Greece and is rated amongst the highest qualities of saffron in the world. Among its properties, it is known for preventing and healing blemishes, as also skin inflammations. Learn more about the unique Greek mythical plant.
Beetroot is known as one of the “super-foods” of our days, with various benefits on health, skin and hair. As for its skin properties, beetroot juice is known for its anti-inflammatory and cleansing properties.
The combination of Krokos Kozanis seeds and natural beetroot juice in this soap offers to soothe inflammations while gently shedding dead skin cells.  The avocado and jojoba oils make it a superbly luxurious bar.
Krokos Kozanis, Beetroot, Extra virgin olive oil, Avocado oil, Coconut oil, Castor oil, Jojoba oil, Greek product, Suitable for vegans, Not tested on animals, No parabens, no SLS

name: Seamuse Mastiha, Tears of Chios, 140g
description: Mastic resin, produced exclusively on the island of Chios, is known for its antioxidant, antibacterial and antifungal properties.
description_full:
Seamuse Mastiha, Tears of Chios, 140g
Description
Mastic resin, produced exclusively on the island of Chios, is known for its antioxidant, antibacterial and antifungal properties. Use daily to give your skin a natural shield of protection and care.
Enriching our natural, handmade soap with mastic, we give a special texture while at the same time the natural resin diffuses throughout the mass, so the beneficial properties of mastic are present and ready to have a beneficial effect. We avoided the easy solution of simply perfuming the soap with essential or aromatic mastic oil and insisted on incorporating the resin into the body of the soap. This treatment is quite complex and requires special care to maintain the properties through the saponification process.
Chios Mastiha, Extra virgin olive oil, Coconut oil, Castor oil, Greek product, Suitable for vegans, Not tested on animals, No parabens, no SLS

description: It is very helpful for our digestive system and intestinal function, while providing energy and stamina.
description_full:
Chrisomelo blossom honey, 430g
Bees produce the famous flower honey by collecting nectar from different flowers in spring. Blossom honey is one of the sweetest honeys, with soft taste and intense fragrance due to the variety of flowers it contains.
It is very helpful for our digestive system and intestinal function, while providing energy and stamina. This flower variety comes from the village of Plati in Messinia.

name: Chrisomelo Greek honey, 430g
description: Asfaka's honey stimulates the human body and helps with physical fatigue
description_full:
Chrisomelo Greek honey, 430g
It is an excellent honey with a very sweet and special taste, different from other floral honeys we know! Its aroma is mild, its texture is crystalline and its color is yellowish. Asfaka's honey stimulates the human body and helps with physical fatigue. In Chrysomelo we travel with our bees to Arta to obtain this rare type of honey.

name: Chrisomelo Greek Pine Honey, 430g
description: Pine honey is particularly rich in trace elements, which are present in high concentrations and characterize it as a honey with high nutritional value.
description_full:
Chrisomelo Greek Pine Honey, 430g
Pine honey is honey of exceptional quality and comes from the honey secretions of the insect Marchalina hellinica, known as "cotton" or "worker" of the pine, which makes it a special category! Pine honey is particularly rich in trace elements, which are present in high concentrations and characterize it as a honey with high nutritional value.
Its taste has a mild sweetness and its aroma is reminiscent of iodine. Its texture is thick and the color of brown is dark. It has the unique advantage of being a wonderful remedy for throat problems and helps our vocal cords a lot.

name: Chrisomelo Heather Honey, 430g
description: Heather honey belongs to the elite of Greek honeys. It is a product with high nutritional value, which is why it is available in health food stores in Europe.
description_full:
Chrisomelo Heather Honey, 430g
Heather honey belongs to the elite of Greek honeys. It is a product with high nutritional value, which is why it is available in health food stores in Europe. Excellent honey for children with anemia, but also for the elderly. A little of this honey is enough to literally relive it.
The color of the honey is reddish like brandy. It has a heady smell, reminiscent of liqueur, and a characteristic taste like caramel with coffee. Its texture is liquid and in winter it becomes fine crystal, which facilitates its use as a spread. The origin of this variety is in the Halkidiki peninsula in Macedonia.

name: Chrisomelo Greek Oak Honey, 430g
description: Oak honey is one of the richest honeys with antioxidant properties and is characterized as a honey of exceptional nutritional value.
description_full:
Chrisomelo Greek Oak Honey, 430g
Oak honey is one of the richest honeys with antioxidant properties and is characterized as a honey of exceptional nutritional value. It has a spicy smell, strong and full flavor, thick texture and its color is warm brown, chocolate!
The Aristotle University of Thessaloniki, under the direction of Assistant Professor Chrysoula Tananaki, conducted a study of 48 types of honey, and oak honey proved to be the strongest antioxidant, outperforming the widely advertised Manuka, placing it 6th in the study.
In Chrysomelo we travel with our hives to Orini Nafpaktia to ensure the specific and rare type of honey.

description_full:

It is suitable for making sweets and is much used in pastries.

description_full:

The bees collect the nectar from the thyme varieties of our country, resulting in a honey of excellent quality. Thyme honey is in great demand among consumers and is considered by many as the best Greek honey, which does not change it by anything!
Thyme honey has a sharp, intense and characteristic smell, a blond amber color, a velvety texture and a sweet taste with a slight apsis. At Chrysomelo we travel to Messinia with our hives to ensure the specific type of honey.

name: RAMONA
description: The wood when it’s perfect becomes an industrial product
description_full:
Wooden light
The wood when it’s perfect becomes an industrial product. Creating Wooden light sconces, we went a different way. Our intention was to capture the surprising beauty of wood and its minimalist form. Wooden light sconces are made of an oak board that has been treated with careful brushing and polishing. Then protected with natural oil-wax which just gained its lasting charm.
Wooden light lamps bring a natural element to every interior. Their raw beauty perfectly fits into the atmosphere of modern, minimalist interiors. The light emits from them in a soft and natural way. Remember that wood is a natural material. That is why each lamp can differ from the others in small details of wood grain. However, all dimensions and other details are identical. Wooden light makes every effort to ensure that the lamps you receive are a harmonious set.
1 x E -14 socket. The bulb is not included. Philips HUE recommend. The lamp is covered with full 2 years warranty.

name: Landseife - coffee soap
description: Organic coffee soap is the ideal kitchen soap.
description_full:
Landseife - coffee soap, 100g
Organic coffee soap is the ideal kitchen soap.
Who does not know? Onions, garlic, celery, leeks ... all fine spices and vegetables that should not be missing in almost any good kitchen. Unfortunately, a mostly annoying smell remains on the hands afterwards. Here, the organic coffee soap can quickly remedy the situation. Coffee neutralizes odors in a natural way. The dark, somewhat rough layer of the bottom of the soap removes discoloration such as from cutting carrots from your hands without effort. The light layer gently cares for stressed skin and pampers with rich organic shea butter. A well-tuned care for stressed hands and the optimal kitchen aid.
The organic coffee soap smells deliciously of fresh coffee and is not scented with essential oils, making it suitable for allergy sufferers.

name: Landseife - Peppermint Exfoliating Soap
description: Organic Peppermint Exfoliating Land Soap is ideal for calluses and stubborn dirt, as well as to support skin regeneration.
description_full:
Landseife - Peppermint Exfoliating Soap, 100g
Organic Peppermint Exfoliating Land Soap is ideal for calluses and stubborn dirt, as well as to support skin regeneration.
Many people struggle with cracked calluses, such as on feet and elbows, due to stress.
Often, rubbing these areas with something too harsh, such as a pumice stone, can cause the skin in these areas to dry out even more and perhaps even get injured. Bacteria can enter and cause painful inflammation.
Not so with the Organic Peppermint Exfoliating Soap. The almond stone/olive seed granules used here are finely ground to be a gentle exfoliant and not too aggressive to the skin. It gently carries away calluses or removes old skin residues left behind by the natural regeneration of the skin.
Organic cocoa butter and organic avocado oil provide rich and lasting care for stressed areas. The contained shea butter provides additional moisture. Supporting the contained nettle has an antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effect.
The organic peppermint essential oil not only refreshes tired feet, but also soothes and cools stressed, itchy areas. This soap is also ideal for restoring gentle and, most importantly, clean care to much-used gardener's hands.
Ingredients:
Organic olive oil
Organic cocoa butter
Organic coconut oil
Organic avocado oil
Organic shea butter
Organic peppermint essential oil
Organic nettles
Almond kernel & olive stone granules
Each soap is:

It cleans effortlessly everything in the household. It does not always have to be the chemical club from the plastic bottle. With the organic cleaning and dish soap you do your household plastic-free. Simply use with a little water, ready is the all-round cleaning agent.
Organic blood orange essential oil not only leaves a pleasant fruity smell, but also has an antibacterial effect.

name: Landseife - Organic Salt Soap Citrus
description: The "Salt Soap Citrus" is the perfect combination of an alkaline cure for your skin and a wonderful refreshing and invigorating citrus scent.
description_full:
Landseife - Organic Salt Soap Citrus, 90g
The "Salt Soap Citrus" is the perfect combination of an alkaline cure for your skin and a wonderful refreshing and invigorating citrus scent. It is mild and nourishing with a gentle exfoliation from finely ground Himalayan salt.
Salt soaps are a classic in skin care. We all know about the positive effect on body and soul at the seaside. Our skin also feels soft and relaxed after a few days of salt water bathing. Our Organic Salt Soap Citrus now brings this feeling to your bathroom. It is popular as a facial soap, for neurodermatitis and impure skin. The Himalayan salt used is natural without anti-caking agents or other chemical additives and contains all natural minerals.
The organic essential oils used, a fine combination of Litsea Cubeba and blood orange oil, provide an invigorating effect on the mind and body and brighten the mood. In addition, this organic natural soap regulates the moisture balance of the skin, has an antibacterial and healing effect.
For this soap we have used, among others, particularly rich oils such as organic walnut oil, organic avocado oil and organic peanut oil. This allows you to achieve a particularly soft skin appearance with gentle care.
Likewise, the included shea butter provides additional care and moisture for your skin.

Natural Himalayan Salt
